reviews.review_description: VERY VERY FUN NOT BORING AND I RECOMMEND, FUN!
It is a very fun and enjoyable experience, and I love my falcon so much!10/10 would recommend!
I saw a wolf in vr video thought it would be fun and yeah super fun it is short and sweet

reviews.review_title: Amazing game, but Amazing game, but
reviews.review_description: It’s good it’s a good game but it’s like kind of short and it’s a little hard to play but there’s a super cute falcon so 22+ points

Struggling with everything - dialogues are started over and over, things noclipping constantly, bird gets unresponsive or downright disappear. Also the quality of the environment itself is subpar. Do not recommend
Kinda short but extremely fun

reviews.review_title: Very fun but a few issues
reviews.review_description: I thought this game was amazing the day I got it. But that’s it, I finished the game in a day which was quite disappointing which how short the story is. The combat was good for the type of game it is. But I wish there would have been more to do
This game sucks its not fun at all, it definitely wasn't worth 20 bucks (2 stars for berd)

reviews.review_title: It wouldn’t let me download it
reviews.review_description: It just doesn’t let me download. It just says headset off-line, and every time I clicked on the app and my headset was connected to Wi-Fi.

𝗙𝗲𝗲𝗹 𝗳𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘂𝘀𝗲 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗸 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝟮𝟱% 𝗼𝗳𝗳 𝗼𝗳 𝘁𝗵𝗶𝘀 𝗴𝗮𝗺𝗲, 𝗼𝗿 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗮𝗻𝘆 𝗼𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿 𝗴𝗮𝗺𝗲𝘀 𝗼𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗹𝗶𝘀𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗺𝗮𝘆 𝗻𝗼𝘁 𝗵𝗮𝘃𝗲.

I was very excited about the concept of the game, but for some reason the game broke after around 30 minutes of play on the morning of the third day. I was able to retrieve food but the bird would not eat it when offered. I tried handing it, tossing it, holding it, calling the bird to me. The first time I fed the bird it had been straightforward. It was very frustrating and I wasn’t able to find any help online. It seemed like the mechanics were off. 

Please let me know if it was user error, so that I can amend my review.

The game was genuinely good, the way the bird acted was great. But the game genuinely felt unfinished. I was expecting to release my bird and the story would continue after they flew back. Also there’s a ton of clipping issues and enemy ai problems and sometimes I couldn’t even move.

I loved this game when I bought it! I’m really disappointed that the whip stopped working a couple days after I bought it. I play on VR and the batons whip all of a sudden stopped working this morning when I loaded it up for the first time. I’m really hoping this issue goes away but as of now my game is unplayable.
Yes
Not playable

A really refreshing VR game to play in an era of constant knock offs. This game has a really cool new kind of implementation to attack and interact with the environment via the hawk mechanic. Being able to dress up and customize the hawk makes it fun and playful. Well made. 

Some of the oddities are the dialogue system is cool at first, but gets old quickly as you realize it doesn’t actually allow any variation in story no matter what you choose. Story was promising, but ending did seem a little anti-climatic.
In the beginning of the game it tells me to feed baby bird on hand but I can not get food anywhere
When I get to part where you get the whip the whip won't work it's just a waste of money in my opinion
Not as advertised. Not fun. Not worth the price.
I love this game but it’s a little hard to figure out. But at her than that I completely support it!

Just a huge waste of money and the game play is way too slow. It has all the hardships of a full on role-playing game hut none of the entertainment. It started off entertaining but the game play got extremely repetitive. It takes too long to get around and the visuals arnt fun to watch because there aren't none.

Pros:
- Fun and unique game play
- Relaxing music/audio

Cons:
- Too short
- Played maybe 6 hours total to finish

The story begins and we get directly attached to our friend in misfortune.
The graphics are rudimentary but are not necessarily embarrassing.
The principle is very interesting, the story looks well constructed.

Unfortunately, the game looks more like a beta (see alpha). Too many bugs will prevent you from enjoying this experience to its full potential.
The movement control is extremely poorly managed, you have to move forward and backward with one joystick and go left to right with the other ... A single joystick for movement would have been more relevant.
Your belt does not turn with you, you may turn on yourself, the bag and your weapon will always stay in the same place. It is not easy to grab your gun behind your back if necessary ...

In the end, it's a game with good potential, with a good story, endearing people but which is marred by bugs that literally prevent you from playing. 

Pity...

Is there going to be a good part why so sad..
Can you make a part 2??

This game looks like it has some potential, but it wasn't ready for release. I had to restart the game twice in the first hour. Now I can't get a refund because I got a 2 games deal and I played the other game for more than 2 hours. This game is far from worth it right now. If they fix all the bugs and glitches, I'll give it another shot, but for now, it's uninstalled.
I’ve had to restart the game a handful of times only to start all over and get stuck in the same place. Needs an update ASAP.

I regularly give a positive review for games but this game needed some special remarks. Positively I would like to say I have never felt so good commanding an animal through a vast world for exploration. Sending my bird to gather some ingredients for a good meal, amazing! The graphics of the bird are also insanely good on the quest! But then negatively.. the colliders in the game are not placed well my friends! The third refinery, the high one. While walking upwards , all the rocky walls are non colliding. And through the whole game I managed to find a few places where colliders were also missing. The story itself didn't hit me as it felt a bit dull and the characters didn't seem to have an impact on me. But I could imagine this felt different for other people.

In short: Had huge expectations, but the story wasn't that great, small bugs as colliders were a bit frustrating, butt... The Bird was amazing and controlling it was amazing!!

Finally, I can write a review on this fantasti... boring game 😒 physics, gameplay and graphics are on mid level. Fighting mechanic are boring and often illogical. All puzzles in the game is “Go there and switch off this”. This was interesting game on flat screen, in VR - nop.  
if to be honest - petting the hawk is only one thing that makes the game.

I already had to restart because I dropped the food and it rolled outside of the cell. There isn't an option to refresh the level or even save the game during! So in starting over, I now cannot get past rehabilitation day 47 because the doors won't open after feeding my bird both pellets. Im beyond frustrated.

It is impossible to complete the game. I got stuck when it told me to go find horned melons. I looked everywhere for a while but couldn't find any. As a last resort, I searched it up on Google but it told me that auntie should've given me the melons. In my game, she did not give me the melons, making it impossible to proceed. I sort of gave up on the game after I spent days looking unsuccessfully for horned melons. This was such a waste of my time and money. Despite this, the falcon is very cute and looks very fluffy. I would also enjoy this game more if the falcon grew slowly instead of suddenly going from a baby to a fully grown bird. As an animal lover, it was hard to watch my falcon's mother die right in front of me and I could not do anything. Going back to the horned melons problem, my whole family were assisting me in attempting to find horned melons but it was all to no avail. Shout out to my older brother who watched a 2 hour long youtube video only to find out that it did not reveal the location of the horned melons.

Can't get a refund because I bought the bundle supposedly over 2 weeks ago despite having bought the Falcon Age half of it within the refund window.

Total nonsense. None too impressed by this game. By 2020 VR standards I don't think it holds up nearly well enough

reviews.review_title: Dont get me wrong, great game....but
reviews.review_description:
But, I wish that moving around could be a little more fluid. Im fine with teleporting, but sometimes I cant teleport in certain directions or I have to struggle to teleport out of a corner.
This is most prevelant when teleporting at a sideways angle, and around the beginning of the game while mining ore.
Keep in mind thar I may just have bad timing with the joysticks, and I only just started the game. I don't know if these issues are my fault or if they just pollish up later in the game. 
Over all though, fun mechanics and a great experiance so far.
Played an hour , and sadly it is one of the most boring game there is. Waiting for a bird with some direction issues to attack or do something. it is boring.
Don’t buy it...this game is terrible. And now I can’t even return it because I have more than 2 hours of gameplay because I was giving it an extra chance

reviews.review_title: Wait for awhile, maybe they'll fix it.
reviews.review_description:
Warning for anyone who is an animal lover, death of mom bird happens in front of you and you get a good minute of staring at her dead body on the window sill before the scene fades away.
It's a bit confusing, I started on window sill next to the nest looking down at a girl in the cell. Wasn't told to do anything and looked over the edge into the room to see a lighted circle which implied I should stand there (and FYI, those are always on, they're not always suggestions to where to go next). I had to readjust the view so I could walk to the circle. I was then told to wake up, eat food and then go to another room all with the girl sitting on the bed. She is apparently who you play as she was gone the following day and there was ever only one bunk.
I may give the game a few tries before asking for a refund.
That and the fact that I spent a good 3 minutes trying to put the hammer back on the wall before it stayed the first time then after 9 minutes the second time I gave up and turned the game off is why I gave it only one star. 
Getting around the area is brutal due to the controls. It's your normal point and go movement, but sometimes you have to point a few times before you actually go. Sometimes you do something and you find yourself on the other side of the room in addition to what you were trying to do.
There are animal deaths as Falcons got to eat, so be aware of that, the one time I could hunt it was a rabbit and it wasn't as traumatic as the mom's death. 
The instructions can be clear, but I was breaking rocks for awhile before I decided on my own to stop and turn in the ore before I got the message to go back to my cell. And I was only able to turn in maybe 5 of the 25 ore I collected before the bin shut in my face. I don't know where the extra ore went.
Both my hand controllers have/had full battery and so did the headset at the time of gameplay, so I can't write off some of the stuff for that.

I’ve always wanted a hunting bird and this game does a great job of scratching that itch. I also really like the game play mechanics. That said this game could have had the sub title A VR Critique of Modern Capitalism, which is fine but it is really present in the story from the start. If that is something you can’t handle then perhaps you should pass on this game other wise it’s a must have title imo. I’m just getting into the heart of battle and it’s definitely a new way to fight. May you have a bountiful hunt.

Update: After completing the game I really enjoyed he game play mechanics however the story made little sense. I feel like the beginning is perceived as one thing though it may be something completely different. I will play through the story again to with that POV and see if it changes things.

reviews.review_title: Cool mechanic with falcon but thats it
reviews.review_description:
Must say I'm quite disappointed after completing this game. 
First of all they did do a great job with the falcon and its realy cool to have it land on your hand. But thats where the cool ends.
The game has a cooking/gathering system that is completely redundant. You can litterly play without gathering or cooking anything. If you die, what you killed stays dead and you just respawn where you where. So having to be mindfull of your falcons HP is irrelevant. There is one shop that has some little toys for your falcon but here is the real problem. They spent too much time making toys for the falcon and not enough time on the story. The game abruptly ends. No end game boss and it forces you to do something you wont think is correct before roling credits. Besides that you don't learn anything new throughout the game that you don't learn at the start. It feels like a game that the creators woke up one day and said meh don't want to make this anymore do just chucked a poor quality ending on at that point then brushed their hands. Its worth a chuckle when on sale but don't pay full price just to play with the falcon as the game is very short, its even shorter when you realise that 3 main implemented systems are gimiks without importance.

—————————————
REVIEW
—————————————

This is a nice open world game and comes with the typical gameplay: walk around, talk to people do some side quests or stick to the main one. To be honest I’m not the biggest fan of these kinds of games, but it’s not to bad and the story keeps me going so far.

I quickly fell in love with the falcon, she’s super cute, also there are different upgrades that can be unlocked, which I love.

There are several cutesy items you’ll get that do absolutely nothing useful, you can give it to the falcon and she does something more or less funny with them (which is sweet I guess, but not what I’d be looking for in a game though I’m sure some people will love all of this).

To round it up, if you like open world games, walking around, collecting things and enjoy cute animations or you simply wanna see something a little different than all the shooting games this is for you.


—————————————
FEATURE REQUESTS
—————————————

There are some things that could use improvement (hopefully the developers will read this):

- add more haptic feedback when hitting, mining or maybe swinging the stick: it feels alien to hit something with the hammer/stick without feeling anything. This would highly improve immersion. A slight tapping while holding the falcon would also be welcome.

- add a smooth locomotion movement option to follow the hand: I only found an option to walk where I’m looking, but I greatly prefer walking straight while looking about, which is impossible as it is. I actually find it a bit uncomfortable this way.

- the Falcon could fly down a bit faster when it tries landing in my hand

- the menu interactions feel a bit dated. At least let me use one joystick to switch between items/quests and the other to switch pages on the items screen. It’s a bit annoying having to clock the small arrows to switch the pages 

I hope you find this feedback useful. Thanks for your work and time :)

When i saw the trailers for this game i was very excited to see what it had in store so i bought the game on launch day, the games been out for almost a month now and i still havent finished it, not bc it’s challenging or long just because i almost have to force myself to play the game, holding the falcon and watching them do tricks makes you feel so cool, but the combat gets very repetitive and the environment gets stale after 30 minutes, i always seem to get stuck on invisible objects and for a game described as embarking on a journey where you grow alongside your falcon I expected the falcon to grow throughout the course of the game, but no, you have a baby falcon and then after a fade to black your falcon is fully grown, the kind of connection i was looking to have with this bird wasnt offered in this game. There’s nothing really too collect other then recipes which provide various little buffs to your bird but other than that i cant see myself ever replaying this game, if i can somehow force myself to finish it. I feel like this game could have benefited from an extra few month of polish to work out all the broken features. I can’t recommend this game for those reasons.
